flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Bucks County Community College fell 32% between 2006 and 2009 (17.5% → 11.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bucks County Community College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.9k → $5.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bucks County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Bucks County Community College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (64.3% → 75.1%).
